news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds

holdings.infoBox: UGE is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Consumer Staples (UGE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Consumer Staples Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x exposure to a market cap-weighted index of consumer staples stocks drawn from the S&P 500. UGE was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: S&P Consumer Staples Select Sector Index

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...
